title: PRKR (Parkour)
body:
# **PRKR**    ‎‎                                                                                                ‎![PRKR boots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8f29423afac132e426346aab2dbdf129f84910a.png)

## Description
A vanilla datapack that adds easy to learn but hard to master parkour into Minecraft

## Info
**The datapack currently includes:**
- Wallrunning
- Walljumping
- Climbing
- Runups


**Currently working on:**
- Bugfixes


**Known issuses:**
- Pack format may sometimes be incorrect (datapack says its outdated but will still function)


## Extra stuff
Note: multiplayer has not been fully tested yet and may include bugs

This datapack's parkour was inspired by the movement in Titanfall 2

By Amo101

![Amo's player head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f01fa746cabbbd1d0a49fba2d87219352dba043.png)
